servinfo.title: Clutch Fluid Pipe Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Clutch Fluid Pipe and Hose Components

attention4.ptxt: Brake fluid is extremely damaging to painted surfaces.
If brake fluid contacts a painted surface, immediately wipe it off and flush the surface thoroughly with water.

s1.ptxt: Remove coolant reservoir from coolant reservoir bracket.
Remove battery, battery tray and battery bracket with ECM.
Remove dust and dirt from each joint of pipe to be disconnected and clean around brake master cylinder reservoir cap.
Remove fluid from brake master cylinder reservoir with syringe or the like.
Pull out clamp (1) at clutch master cylinder (3) and pull out clamp (5) at fluid pipe joint (4), to disconnect clutch fluid pipe (2).
Pull out clamps at clutch fluid pipe, to disconnect clutch fluid pipe.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: After installation, check clutch pedal free travel.
Add fluid to MAX level of reservoir.
